channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Advocate proposes renaming English to 'American' as official U.S. language
item.description: As the United States approaches its 250th anniversary, a push has emerged to formally rename the nation's official language from English to 'American.' Rob Lockwood, a former adviser to Doug Burgum, w...

item.title: Terry Pluto on the Browns’ first-round priorities and team focus
item.description: This article focuses on Terry Pluto’s perspective on the Cleveland Browns as they approach the first round of the NFL Draft. The central idea is that the team needs to stay disciplined and avoid getti...

item.title: Trump halts US envoys' planned trip to Pakistan, undermining Iran peace talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump has cancelled a planned visit to Pakistan by two envoys, special envoy Steve Witkoff and his son-in-law Jared Kushner, dealing a setback to ongoing peace talks aimed at resol...

item.title: J&K Political Parties Urge Temporary Release for Engineer Rashid to Visit Hospitalised Father
item.description: In Jammu and Kashmir, political parties have come together in support of Engineer Rashid, the jailed Member of Parliament from Baramulla, urging authorities to grant him temporary bail on humanitarian...

item.title: Labor's Andrew Leigh's Immigration System Defence Misses the Mark
item.description: In a recent opinion piece, Liberal Senator Jonno Duniam sharply criticises Andrew Leigh's stance on Australia's immigration system. Duniam argues that the system is broken and no longer commands the t...

item.title: Petersen confident as in-form Chiefs prepare for crucial Soweto derby clash
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs goalkeeper Brandon Petersen has expressed confidence ahead of the highly anticipated Soweto derby against Orlando Pirates, saying the team is in a positive space and determined to finish...

item.title: Gladiator star Giant leaves the show after alleged conflict over girlfriend's career
item.description: Jamie Bigg, also known as Giant from the BBC's Gladiators, has announced he will not be returning for the show's fourth season. The 6ft 5in former bodybuilder and firefighter revealed on Instagram tha...

item.title: PH-Japan Friendship Highlighted at Matsuri Festival 2026
item.description: The Matsuri Festival 2026, held to commemorate 70 years of friendship between the Philippines and Japan, showcased a vibrant celebration of culture and tradition. The event featured a range of cultura...

item.title: PM Shehbaz reaffirms Pakistan's role in fostering regional peace in conversation with Iranian president
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif engaged in a 50-minute phone call with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, emphasizing Pakistan's dedication to being an 'honest and sincere facilitator' in promoting pe...

item.title: Luis Manzano Expresses Gratitude for Jessy Mendiola's Heartfelt Birthday Greeting
item.description: Luis Manzano, a popular Kapamilya actor, was visibly moved by a heartfelt birthday message from his wife, Jessy Mendiola. The message, which was likely shared on social media, elicited a warm response...

item.title: Lions secure crucial win over Connacht, edging closer to URC play-offs
item.description: The Lions in Joburg are tantalisingly close to their first United Rugby Championship (URC) play-off berth after a commanding 33-21 victory over Connacht at Ellis Park on Saturday. Henco van Wyk starre...

item.title: Small boat arrival in Dover despite £163.6m UK-France migration deal
item.description: A small boat has arrived in Dover, marking the first such crossing since the UK struck a £163.6 million deal with France aimed at curbing migrant crossings of the English Channel. The deal, which invo...

item.title: Sunak criticises Starmer’s judgement over Mandelson appointment amid growing political pressure
item.description: Rishi Sunak has urged Sir Keir Starmer to accept responsibility for the controversy surrounding Lord Peter Mandelson’s proposed appointment as UK ambassador to the United States, describing it as a se...

item.title: Over 5,000 Borno residents displaced, urgent humanitarian support needed in Pulka
item.description: Over 5,000 people from Ngoshe in Gwoza LGA, Borno State don run go Pulka after armed attacks destroy their homes. Displacement started early March, and now many dey sleep for open spaces and roadside ...

item.title: Zamfara APC Leaders Officially Support Tinubu and Lawal for 2027 Elections
item.description: Stakeholders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) for Zamfara State don meet for high-level gathering for Government House, Gusau on Saturday, April 25, 2026. Dem meeting gather top party leaders, i...

item.title: How to Avoid Hospice Scams and Choose the Right Care
item.description: Fraudulent activities in the hospice industry have become a major concern, especially in California, where scammers have bilked millions from Medicare. Despite the growing problem, good hospice care o...

item.title: Princess Catherine participates in Anzac Day commemorations in London
item.description: Princess Catherine marked Anzac Day in London by laying a wreath to honour Australians and New Zealanders who lost their lives in military conflicts. The ceremony at the Cenotaph drew hundreds of atte...

item.title: Dr Mohammad Faisal to leave role as Pakistan’s High Commissioner to the UK, successor nominated
item.description: Dr Mohammad Faisal, Pakistan’s High Commissioner to the United Kingdom, is set to relinquish his charge by April 27, according to sources from the Foreign Office. He has been serving in this position ...

item.title: Exploring the Lives and Resilience of Palestinian Queer Communities
item.description: The anthology 'Homosexual Intifada', edited by George Abraham and Hannah Moushabeck, provides a profound exploration of the challenges and resilience of Palestinian queer communities. The contributors...

item.title: Practical guide on selling a $100 Steam gift card safely in Nigeria
item.description: For Nigeria, plenty people dey find ways to convert their $100 Steam gift card to cash, especially when dem no need gaming credit again. This article break down the common methods people dey use and t...
